description: Comprehensive handwritten and digital notes covering the complete GATE Mechanical Engineering (ME) syllabus with theory, solved examples, numerical problems, design concepts, and previous year questions.

resources.title: Engineering Mathematics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Complex Variables, Probability, Numerical Methods and Statistics with GATE PYQs.

resources.title: Applied Mechanics
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Engineering mechanics, statics, dynamics, equilibrium, friction, virtual work, vibrations, kinematics and kinetics.

resources.title: Strength of Materials
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Stress and strain, bending, shear, torsion, deflection of beams, columns, pressure vessels and failure theories.

resources.title: Theory of Machines
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Kinematic mechanisms, gears, cams, flywheels, governors, clutches, brakes, balancing, gyroscope and vibrations.

resources.title: Fluid Mechanics
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Fluid properties, hydrostatics, fluid kinematics, dynamics, boundary layer, pipe flow, turbomachinery and open channel flow.

resources.title: Heat Transfer
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Conduction, convection, radiation, heat exchangers, fins, boiling, condensation and thermal insulation.

resources.title: Thermodynamics
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Laws of thermodynamics, entropy, exergy, ideal gases, pure substances, thermodynamic cycles and psychrometry.

resources.title: Manufacturing Engineering
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Metal casting, forming, welding, machining, additive manufacturing, metrology, tool design and manufacturing processes.

resources.title: Machine Design
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Design of shafts, springs, bearings, gears, clutches, brakes, fasteners, welded joints and fatigue analysis.

resources.title: Industrial Engineering
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Production planning and control, inventory management, operations research, quality control, supply chain management and facility planning.
